title: hesperanthes stenocarpa
intro: Hesperanthes stenocarpa, commonly known as the small-fruited orchid, is a species of flowering plant in the orchid family. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly in treating respiratory issues and skin conditions due to its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties. The small-fruited orchid has been reported to provide several health benefits, including soothing coughs, reducing fever, and aiding in wound healing. In herbal preparations, Hesperanthes stenocarpa is often used in infusions, decoctions, or as a topical application, although further research is needed to confirm its efficacy and potential side effects.
